codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly adds an auth-gated WebSocket endpoint at /api/ws. It strictly enforces access JWT validation before upgrading, dials the sandbox with the trusted user context injected correctly, relays frames bidirectionally and gracefully propagates close conditions. Comprehensive test cases check all happy and denial paths perfectly. No code issues or bugs were found.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The services.yaml currently omits the required AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY variable for the proxy service which means running proxy.start from the definitions might fail.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker ran the proxy using a temporary command: PROXY_PORT=18082 AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY=... SANDBOX_URL=... go run ./cmd/proxy &

summary: Implementation is perfect, no code issues found. A services.yaml observation was reported.
